title: tetracentron sinense
intro: Tetracentron sinense is a species of plant, also known as Chinese parasol tree, belonging to the family Trochodendraceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Tetracentron sinense include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Tetracentron sinense is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and its roots are used in herbal preparations to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
